title: [codereview-P2] lichen_hash_32 loop unrolling and const
description: link_ctx.c:517-520 hash loops use int i and non-const. For embedded, use size_t or uint8_t counter, mark params const. Matches C coding guidelines in AGENTS.md for no dynamic alloc, C11. P2 readability. Child of project-LICHEN-da2q.9.3.
close_reason: Fixed in chunk 1 after 3 codereview passes (P1 endian fixed with explicit LE bytes, P2 style cleaned, P3 test noted for next chunk). Hash now matches spec for rendezvous. Updated lichen/subsys/lichen/link/.
